params.beneficiary: Address that can exercise the claim

createClaim(address,address,uint256).notice: Create a claim: right to receive tokens, exercisable by beneficiary

distribute(address,address,uint256).notice: Direct distribution: send tokens to recipient immediately

exerciseClaim(uint256,uint256).notice: Exercise a claim — beneficiary receives tokens at their discretion

stewardSpend(address,address,uint256).notice: Steward: deploy operational budget (up to 1% of treasury balance monthly)
